title: Systemd stop hook and Temporal failure alerting

log.context: Systemd stop hook and Temporal failure alerting

All three parts are complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Part 1 — systemd ExecStopPost hooks**

- Created `/mnt/data/scripts/service-crash-alert.sh` — reads `SERVICE_RESULT` and `EXIT_CODE` env vars (set by systemd automatically on stop), skips if `SERVICE_RESULT=success`, and injects a crash notice to BigClungus via the inject endpoint.
- Added `ExecStopPost=/mnt/data/scripts/service-crash-alert.sh %n` to `clunger.service`, `temporal-worker.service`, and `cloudflared.service`.
